falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5000 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest a reversal of the pattern's implied bearish trajectory.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top phase, directly contradicting the current HOLD and pattern similarity to a bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: Federal Reserve announces a 50 basis point rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic monetary policy shift would inject liquidity and invalidate the current HOLD by creating conditions inconsistent with the pattern's implied market dynamics.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
